characters.appearance: A young man in his late 20s or early 30s with a slim to athletic build and a fair complexion. He has short, dark, neatly styled hair. He is only seen from the back and in partial profile, so his facial features are not visible.
characters.wardrobe: A casual grey hooded sweatshirt, dark blue jeans, and grey sneakers.
characters.demeanor: Contemplative and engaged, looking intently at the large screen in front of him.

characters.appearance: A beautiful young Indian woman's head on a cyborg body. She has a fair complexion, large, expressive dark eyes, and defined features. Her dark hair is styled in an elegant updo adorned with white flowers. She wears traditional Indian jewelry, including a maang tikka on her forehead and a nose ring. Her neck and upper torso are robotic, with visible silver wiring and white and pink metallic plates.
characters.wardrobe: Her body is a white and pink robotic shell. She wears a gold and red maang tikka, a gold nose ring with a chain, and has white flowers in her hair.
characters.demeanor: Authoritative yet encouraging, speaking directly to the viewer with varied expressions ranging from serious to smiling.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: मीटिंग में कुछ बोलना चाहते हो, पर इंग्लिश की वजह से चुप रह जाते हो? तो रील्स देखना छोड़ो और अपने करियर पे ध्यान दो। [Do you want to say something in the meeting, but stay quiet because of English? Then stop watching reels and focus on your career.]

Character B says: आज दुनिया AI से आगे बढ़ रही है। जब सब लोग नई टेक्नोलॉजी से सीख रहे हैं, तो तुम पीछे क्यों हो? [Today the world is moving forward with AI. When everyone is learning with new technology, why are you behind?]

Character B says: सिर्फ वीडियोस देखने से इंग्लिश बोलना नहीं आएगा। Supernova डाउनलोड करो और मेरे जैसे AI ट्यूटर के साथ बात करके प्रैक्टिस करो। [You won't learn to speak English just by watching videos. Download Supernova and practice by talking with an AI tutor like me.]

Character B says: इंग्लिश बोलने से आती है, रटने से नहीं। तुम बेझिझक बोलो, मैं तुम्हारी गलतियां सुधारूंगी, वो भी बिना जज किये। [English comes from speaking, not memorizing. You speak without hesitation, I will correct your mistakes, that too without judging.]

Character B says: हज़ारों लोगों ने Supernova के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना सीखा है और कॉन्फिडेंस पाया है। तुम किसका इंतज़ार कर रहे हो? आज ही Supernova ट्राई करो। [Thousands of people have learned to speak English with Supernova and gained confidence. What are you waiting for? Try Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Confronts the viewer's pain point of staying quiet in meetings due to poor English.
- Problem: Highlights that passive learning (videos/reels) isn't enough in an AI-driven world.
- Solution: Introduces Supernova's AI tutor for active speaking practice without judgment.
- CTA: Encourages downloading the app to gain confidence.
